name: I'm on the side of the Skyscraper
description: I'm on the side of the Skyscraper
hints: Clinging to the side of the skyscraper! You're on the top floor. LOOK SKYSCRAPER to search the exterior.
LOOK SKYSCRAPER finds something hidden on the building's exterior. You can JUMP to another building or GO FORWARD.

LOOK SKYSCRAPER finds items (drops held). JUMP, GO SKYSCRAPER, or GO FORWARD all move to a floating area (room 18). LOOK DOWN confirms you're on the top floor. EAST returns to the waiting room (room 10). UP and DOWN both go to room 20.
Search the building exterior with LOOK SKYSCRAPER. JUMP or GO FORWARD to leap across. EAST to re-enter the building.

effects: Message: I'm on the TOP floor!

notes: Side of the skyscraper, top floor. LOOK SKYSCRAPER finds items (drops held). JUMP/GO FORWARD/GO SKYSCRAPER all go to floating area (room 18). EAST to waiting room (room 10). UP/DOWN both go to room 20.
